name: @magpie/web
description: The non-developer onboarding surface: a single static page that joins a Magpie call by pairing code and watches the live transcript. No framework, no build step.
//: Zero runtime dependencies on purpose. The page is plain HTML + ES-module JS served by a tiny dependency-free node http server. Node >=22 runs the .ts server directly (type-stripping); on older node use `node --import tsx ./src/serve.ts`.
